description: Visualizes how users traverse the product - event transitions from login through all interactions

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(weight) as total FROM `tempest-production.friday_analytics.user_journey_transitions` WHERE source != target

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as users FROM (SELECT user_id FROM `tempest-production.friday_analytics.analytics_events` WHERE environment = 'production' AND user_id IS NOT NULL AND user_id != '' AND timestamp >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 90 DAY))

WITH sessions AS (SELECT user_id, session_window, COUNT(*) as steps FROM `tempest-production.friday_analytics.user_journey_first_steps` GROUP BY user_id, session_window) SELECT ROUND(AVG(steps), 1) as avg_steps FROM sessions

SELECT ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(CASE WHEN target = 'session.failed' THEN weight ELSE 0 END), SUM(CASE WHEN target IN ('session.completed', 'session.failed') THEN weight ELSE 0 END)) * 100, 1) as failure_pct FROM `tempest-production.friday_analytics.user_journey_transitions`

panels.description: Node size = total flow through that event. Edge thickness = transition count. Hover for details.

targets.rawSql: WITH node_weights AS (SELECT source as node_id, SUM(weight) as total_weight FROM `tempest-production.friday_analytics.user_journey_transitions` WHERE source != target GROUP BY source UNION ALL SELECT target as node_id, SUM(weight) as total_weight FROM `tempest-production.friday_analytics.user_journey_transitions` WHERE source != target GROUP BY target) SELECT node_id as id, CASE node_id WHEN 'user.signed_up' THEN 'Sign Up' WHEN 'user.profile_completed' THEN 'Profile Setup' WHEN 'user.logged_in' THEN 'Login' WHEN 'conversation.started' THEN 'Start Conversation' WHEN 'workspace.created' THEN 'Create Workspace' WHEN 'job.defined' THEN 'Define Job' WHEN 'session.started' THEN 'Session Started' WHEN 'session.completed' THEN 'Session Completed' WHEN 'session.failed' THEN 'Session Failed' WHEN 'artifact.created' THEN 'Artifact Created' WHEN 'gist.created' THEN 'Gist Created' ELSE node_id END as title, CAST(SUM(total_weight) AS STRING) as mainstat, CASE WHEN node_id LIKE 'user.%' THEN 0.3 WHEN node_id = 'session.failed' THEN 0.0 WHEN node_id = 'session.completed' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.6 END as arc__success FROM node_weights GROUP BY node_id

SELECT CONCAT(source, '-', target) as id, source, target, CAST(weight AS STRING) as mainstat FROM `tempest-production.friday_analytics.user_journey_transitions` WHERE source != target AND weight >= 2 ORDER BY weight DESC

panels.title: User Journey Graph

panels.description: Most common user flow transitions (source → target)

targets.rawSql: SELECT CONCAT(CASE source WHEN 'user.signed_up' THEN 'Sign Up' WHEN 'user.profile_completed' THEN 'Profile Setup' WHEN 'user.logged_in' THEN 'Login' WHEN 'conversation.started' THEN 'Conversation' WHEN 'workspace.created' THEN 'Workspace' WHEN 'job.defined' THEN 'Job Defined' WHEN 'session.started' THEN 'Sess Start' WHEN 'session.completed' THEN 'Sess Done' WHEN 'session.failed' THEN 'Sess Failed' WHEN 'artifact.created' THEN 'Artifact' ELSE source END, ' → ', CASE target WHEN 'user.signed_up' THEN 'Sign Up' WHEN 'user.profile_completed' THEN 'Profile Setup' WHEN 'user.logged_in' THEN 'Login' WHEN 'conversation.started' THEN 'Conversation' WHEN 'workspace.created' THEN 'Workspace' WHEN 'job.defined' THEN 'Job Defined' WHEN 'session.started' THEN 'Sess Start' WHEN 'session.completed' THEN 'Sess Done' WHEN 'session.failed' THEN 'Sess Failed' WHEN 'artifact.created' THEN 'Artifact' ELSE target END) as transition, weight as count, unique_users FROM `tempest-production.friday_analytics.user_journey_transitions` WHERE source != target ORDER BY weight DESC LIMIT 15

panels.title: Top Event Transitions

panels.description: What users do immediately after authenticating

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE target WHEN 'conversation.started' THEN 'Start Conversation' WHEN 'workspace.created' THEN 'Create Workspace' WHEN 'session.started' THEN 'Session Started' WHEN 'artifact.created' THEN 'View Artifact' WHEN 'job.defined' THEN 'Define Job' ELSE target END as next_action, weight as count, unique_users FROM `tempest-production.friday_analytics.user_journey_transitions` WHERE source IN ('user.logged_in', 'user.signed_up', 'user.profile_completed') AND source != target ORDER BY weight DESC

panels.title: First Action After Login/Signup

panels.description: Complete list of event transitions with user counts

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE source WHEN 'user.signed_up' THEN 'Sign Up' WHEN 'user.profile_completed' THEN 'Profile Setup' WHEN 'user.logged_in' THEN 'Login' WHEN 'conversation.started' THEN 'Start Conversation' WHEN 'workspace.created' THEN 'Create Workspace' WHEN 'job.defined' THEN 'Define Job' WHEN 'session.started' THEN 'Session Started' WHEN 'session.completed' THEN 'Session Completed' WHEN 'session.failed' THEN 'Session Failed' WHEN 'artifact.created' THEN 'Artifact Created' WHEN 'gist.created' THEN 'Gist Created' ELSE source END as from_event, CASE target WHEN 'user.signed_up' THEN 'Sign Up' WHEN 'user.profile_completed' THEN 'Profile Setup' WHEN 'user.logged_in' THEN 'Login' WHEN 'conversation.started' THEN 'Start Conversation' WHEN 'workspace.created' THEN 'Create Workspace' WHEN 'job.defined' THEN 'Define Job' WHEN 'session.started' THEN 'Session Started' WHEN 'session.completed' THEN 'Session Completed' WHEN 'session.failed' THEN 'Session Failed' WHEN 'artifact.created' THEN 'Artifact Created' WHEN 'gist.created' THEN 'Gist Created' ELSE target END as to_event, weight as transitions, unique_users FROM `tempest-production.friday_analytics.user_journey_transitions` WHERE source != target ORDER BY weight DESC

panels.title: All Transitions (Detailed)

panels.description: Events that end a user session (no next action within 30 min)

targets.rawSql: WITH total_outgoing AS (SELECT source, SUM(weight) as out_weight FROM `tempest-production.friday_analytics.user_journey_transitions` WHERE source != target GROUP BY source), total_as_target AS (SELECT target, SUM(weight) as in_weight FROM `tempest-production.friday_analytics.user_journey_transitions` WHERE source != target GROUP BY target) SELECT CASE t.target WHEN 'user.signed_up' THEN 'Sign Up' WHEN 'user.profile_completed' THEN 'Profile Setup' WHEN 'user.logged_in' THEN 'Login' WHEN 'conversation.started' THEN 'Start Conversation' WHEN 'workspace.created' THEN 'Create Workspace' WHEN 'job.defined' THEN 'Define Job' WHEN 'session.started' THEN 'Session Started' WHEN 'session.completed' THEN 'Session Completed' WHEN 'session.failed' THEN 'Session Failed' WHEN 'artifact.created' THEN 'Artifact Created' WHEN 'gist.created' THEN 'Gist Created' ELSE t.target END as event, t.in_weight - COALESCE(o.out_weight, 0) as drop_off_count FROM total_as_target t LEFT JOIN total_outgoing o ON t.target = o.source WHERE t.in_weight > COALESCE(o.out_weight, 0) ORDER BY drop_off_count DESC

panels.title: Where Users Drop Off (Terminal Events)

panels.description: Sankey flow showing how users move between actions. Thicker bands = more users taking that path.

targets.rawSql: SELECT source, target, weight, unique_users FROM `tempest-production.friday_analytics.user_journey_transitions` WHERE source != target AND weight >= 2 ORDER BY weight DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: User Journey Sankey Diagram
